package.name: eval_faults
package.description: paper §C fault injection — 4 channel (hallucination / adversarial / cognitive_lapse / attribute_mismatch) ROS 2 injector_node + pure helpers. fault_scenario YAML 측 trial 정의 load → channel 별 apply_* dispatch → transformed σ / prompt / utterance / detection republish. ADR-0025 D5 12 PR 시안의 #5 단계.
